main:
Welcome to FruitsApp! 
 'Search fruits': Search up fruit data by fruit name or nutrition data 
 'Compare fruits': When you have added enough fruits to compare, you can graph the fruits by nutrition 
 'Access History' : Prints a list of your search history on this app 
 'Exit' : Exits the program
searchChoose: Do you want to search by name or filter by nutrition?
addToCompare: Add fruit to compare list where they can be graphed
fruitRecommendation: Explore more fruits on the API
graphing: Make a graph to compare your fruits by a particular nutrition
